title: Deluvian fatworm
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Deluvian fatworm |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |class=[[Worm/Legends|Worm]] |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Deluvia system/Legends|Deluvia system]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}{{Planetnamia|species=Deluvian [[Worm/Legends|fatworm]]|system=[[Deluvia system/Legends|Deluvia system]]|legends=1}} |habitat= |diet=[[Parasite/Legends|Parasitic]] |language= }} {{Quote|Just be sure to pay in cash. The interest on his loans will drain you like a Deluvian fatworm on a Hutt's backside.''"
"''First off, Hutts are ALL backside. Secondly, I don't much like the comparison. No need to get personal. It's just business.|Matton Dasol, to Revan, and Eli Gand|}} The '''Deluvian fatworm''' was a type of [[Worm/Legends|worm]] that hailed from the [[Deluvia system/Legends|Deluvia system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Klina sector/Legends|Klina sector]] that was situated close to [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Deluvia system/Legends|Deluvia system]] in grid square S-13 as part of the [[Klina sector/Legends|Klina sector]], which {{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' both depict as situated near [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. It led a [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] lifestyle, attaching itself to the back of members of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}} In [[3956 BBY]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] visited the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. There, he met the [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Eli Gand]] and his [[Slavery/Legends|indentured servant]] [[Matton Dasol]]. When Gand attempted to interest Revan in his wares, Dasol warned the latter that the interest rates of the former's loans would "drain" him in a manner comparable to a Deluvian fatworm parasiting on the back of a Hutt. In response, Gand, who took offense at the comparison, claimed that the Hutts were, in fact, "ALL backside." {{Endgame}} ==Behind the scenes== The Deluvian fatworm was introduced in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. In the game, the creature can be mentioned in an optional conversation the player character, Revan, can have with Eli Gand and Matton Dasol. This article assumes one hundred percent game completion and that the conversation took place as described. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Deluvianischer Fettwurm }} [[Category:Creatures of the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]] [[Category:Parasitic creatures]] [[Category:Worms]]
